page_name: Aerial Yoga Course (Yoga Teacher Training Courses)

spec.props: { eyebrow: string; heading: string; items: string[]; leftImage: string; rightImage: string; leftImageAlt?: string; rightImageAlt?: string }
spec.layout: Full-bleed tinted band (bg-surface-1 or brand-lite tint) with two flanking lifestyle photos absolutely-positioned/grid-anchored on the left and right edges; centered column has eyebrow, h2, then a vertical list of ChecklistItem.
spec.tokens: Use text-h2, text-mini for eyebrow, text-text-primary/secondary, bg-brand-lite or bg-surface-1 for band, border-border-1, rounded-xl on images.
spec.responsive: On md+ show side photos; on mobile stack content above images or hide side photos.
spec.notes: Do NOT modify existing apps/web/src/components/sections/eligibility-section.tsx. This is a sibling.

spec.props: { brand: string; tagline: string; website?: string; websiteHref?: string; columns: Array<{ heading: string; links: Array<{ label: string; href: string }> }>; copyright: string; signature?: string }
spec.layout: Dark band (bg-surface-2 or near-black). 4-col grid on lg: brand+tagline col on left, 3 link columns on right. Bottom row: copyright + signature.
spec.tokens: text-text-inverse for headings, text-text-inverse/70 for body/links, font-heading for brand mark, text-mini for column headings, divider via border-border-2/30.

content_for_this_page.tagline: A school for teachers, a home for seekers. Practice, taught honestly.
content_for_this_page.copyright: © Bodhi School of Yoga · Yoga Alliance Registered School (RYS-200, RYS-300)

spec.notes: Do NOT modify existing site-footer.tsx or layout/footer.tsx. This is a sibling intended to render at the bottom of course pages.

spec.purpose: Render the full Figma node 1:7667 page composition using existing primitives + the 2 new sections from T1/T2.
order: CourseHeroSection — green hero with breadcrumb, chips, CTA, hero photo
FooterBrandCta (FooterCtaBanner) — 'Begin where you are' centered CTA
spec.data: Pull all copy and image refs from _workspace/02_decomposition_node-1-7667.json. Use /figma/node-1-7667/<imgname>.<ext> public paths.

image_mapping.instructor_avatars: Use imgrectangle161124054.png, imgrectangle161124055.png as available (decomp flagged ordinal guesses)

tokens_summary: All required tokens already exist in apps/web/src/app/globals.css. No new tokens needed.
build_constraint: Do NOT modify any existing component file. Only ADD new files at the paths above.
